# matejamilacic27.github.io


<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>ULIX Gastro Bar — Podgorica</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Playfair+Display:ital@1&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --red: #C0392B;
  --red-dark: #96281B;
  --yellow: #F2C94C;
  --dark: #111111;
  --darker: #0A0A0A;
  --brick: #2A1F1A;
  --text: #E8E0D5;
  --muted: #9A8F85;
  --teal: #1A8A7A;
  --white: #FFFFFF;
}
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
body { background: var(--darker); color: var(--text); font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 300; overflow-x: hidden; }

/* ─── NAV ─── */
nav {
  position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 200;
  display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
  padding: 0 3rem; height: 64px;
  background: rgba(10,10,10,0.96);
  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--red);
  backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
}
.nav-logo {
  font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
  font-size: 2rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; color: var(--white);
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
}
.nav-logo span { color: var(--red); }
.nav-tag { font-size: 0.55rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1; }
.nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2.5rem; list-style: none; }
.nav-links a { color: var(--muted); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.78rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 500; transition: color 0.2s; }
.nav-links a:hover { color: var(--yellow); }
.nav-cta { background: var(--red); color: var(--white); padding: 0.55rem 1.4rem; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; transition: background 0.2s; }
.nav-cta:hover { background: var(--red-dark); }

/* ─── HERO ─── */
.hero {
  height: 100vh; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  display: flex; align-items: flex-end;
}
.hero-bg {
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; object-position: center;
  filter: brightness(0.45);
}
.hero-overlay {
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(10,10,10,1) 0%, rgba(10,10,10,0.3) 50%, transparent 100%);
}
.hero-content {
  position: relative; z-index: 2;
  padding: 0 4rem 5rem;
  width: 100%;
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; align-items: flex-end; gap: 4rem;
}
.hero-eyebrow {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.hero-eyebrow-line { width: 40px; height: 2px; background: var(--red); }
.hero-eyebrow-text { font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.3em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--red); font-weight: 500; }
.hero-title {
  font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(4.5rem, 10vw, 9rem);
  line-height: 0.9; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: var(--white);
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.hero-title .outline { -webkit-text-stroke: 2px var(--white); color: transparent; }
.hero-title .red { color: var(--red); }
.hero-desc { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.8; max-width: 440px; margin-bottom: 2.5rem; }
.hero-btns { display: flex; gap: 1rem; }
.btn-red { background: var(--red); color: var(--white); padding: 0.9rem 2.2rem; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Inter'; font-size: 0.78rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; transition: all 0.2s; }
.btn-red:hover { background: var(--red-dark); transform: translateY(-2px); }
.btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: var(--white); padding: 0.9rem 2.2rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3); cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Inter'; font-size: 0.78rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 500; transition: all 0.2s; }
.btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--yellow); color: var(--yellow); }
.hero-stats {
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem;
  border-left: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding-left: 3rem;
}
.stat-num { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 3rem; color: var(--yellow); line-height: 1; }
.stat-label { font-size: 0.68rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 0.1rem; }

/* ─── TICKER ─── */
.ticker { background: var(--red); padding: 0.75rem 0; overflow: hidden; white-space: nowrap; }
.ticker-inner { display: inline-flex; gap: 3rem; animation: ticker 20s linear infinite; }
.ticker-inner span { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; color: var(--white); }
.ticker-inner .dot { color: var(--yellow); font-size: 0.5rem; align-self: center; }
@keyframes ticker { from { transform: translateX(0); } to { transform: translateX(-50%); } }

/* ─── INTERIOR GALLERY ─── */
.gallery { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.6fr 1fr 1fr; grid-template-rows: 320px 220px; gap: 4px; }
.gal-item { overflow: hidden; position: relative; }
.gal-item:nth-child(1) { grid-row: 1 / 3; }
.gal-item img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 0.6s; filter: brightness(0.85); }
.gal-item:hover img { transform: scale(1.04); filter: brightness(1); }
.gal-label {
  position: absolute; bottom: 1rem; left: 1rem;
  font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
  background: var(--red); color: var(--white);
  padding: 0.3rem 0.75rem; font-weight: 600;
}

/* ─── ABOUT ─── */
.about {
  background: var(--dark); padding: 7rem 4rem;
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 6rem; align-items: center;
}
.about-badge {
  display: inline-flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
  border: 2px solid var(--red); padding: 1.5rem 2rem;
  margin-bottom: 2rem; width: fit-content;
}
.about-badge-top { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.3em; color: var(--muted); }
.about-badge-main { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 2.5rem; color: var(--red); line-height: 1; letter-spacing: 0.1em; }
.about-badge-sub { font-size: 0.62rem; letter-spacing: 0.3em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 0.25rem; }
.about-h { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 4vw, 4rem); color: var(--white); line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
.about-h em { color: var(--yellow); font-style: normal; }
.about-p { font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.9; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
.about-tags { display: flex; gap: 0.75rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 2rem; }
.tag { background: rgba(192,57,43,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(192,57,43,0.4); color: var(--red); padding: 0.4rem 1rem; font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 500; }
.about-img-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 8px; }
.about-img-grid img { width: 100%; height: 200px; object-fit: cover; }
.about-img-grid img:first-child { grid-column: 1 / 3; height: 280px; }

/* ─── MENU ─── */
.menu-section { background: var(--darker); padding: 7rem 4rem; }
.section-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end; margin-bottom: 3.5rem; }
.section-label { font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.3em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--red); margin-bottom: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; }
.section-h { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 4vw, 4rem); color: var(--white); line-height: 1; }
.section-h em { color: var(--yellow); font-style: normal; }
.menu-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 2px; }
.dish-card { background: #161616; overflow: hidden; position: relative; cursor: pointer; }
.dish-card:hover .dish-img { transform: scale(1.06); }
.dish-img-wrap { height: 220px; overflow: hidden; position: relative; }
.dish-img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 0.5s; display: block; }
.dish-rank {
  position: absolute; top: 0.75rem; left: 0.75rem;
  background: var(--red); color: var(--white);
  font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 1.1rem;
  width: 32px; height: 32px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
}
.dish-body { padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem 1.5rem; }
.dish-top { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 0.3rem; }
.dish-name { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 1.35rem; color: var(--white); letter-spacing: 0.04em; line-height: 1.1; }
.dish-price { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 1.3rem; color: var(--yellow); white-space: nowrap; margin-left: 0.5rem; }
.dish-weight { font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 0.6rem; text-transform: uppercase; }
.dish-desc { font-size: 0.76rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.6; }
.dish-bar { height: 2px; background: var(--red); width: 0; transition: width 0.4s; margin-top: 1rem; }
.dish-card:hover .dish-bar { width: 100%; }

/* ─── FEATURES ─── */
.features { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4,1fr); }
.feat {
  padding: 3.5rem 2rem; text-align: center;
  border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
  background: #131313; transition: background 0.3s;
}
.feat:last-child { border-right: none; }
.feat:hover { background: #1a1a1a; }
.feat-icon { font-size: 2.2rem; margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }
.feat-title { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 1.2rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
.feat-desc { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.7; }

/* ─── VIBE SECTION ─── */
.vibe { background: var(--red); padding: 5rem 4rem; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 4rem; align-items: center; }
.vibe-h { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: clamp(3rem, 5vw, 5.5rem); color: var(--white); line-height: 0.9; }
.vibe-h .stroke { -webkit-text-stroke: 2px var(--white); color: transparent; }
.vibe-points { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.25rem; }
.vibe-point { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 1rem; }
.vibe-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; background: var(--yellow); border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 0.4rem; }
.vibe-text { font-size: 0.88rem; line-height: 1.7; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); }
.vibe-text strong { color: var(--white); font-weight: 600; display: block; margin-bottom: 0.2rem; }

/* ─── VISIT ─── */
.visit { background: var(--dark); padding: 7rem 4rem; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 5rem; align-items: center; }
.visit-img { width: 100%; height: 460px; object-fit: cover; object-position: center; }
.visit-h { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 4vw, 4rem); color: var(--white); line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
.visit-h em { color: var(--red); font-style: normal; }
.info-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1.5rem 2rem; margin-bottom: 2.5rem; }
.info-item {}
.info-label { font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--red); margin-bottom: 0.35rem; font-weight: 600; }
.info-val { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.6; }
.visit-btns { display: flex; gap: 1rem; }

/* ─── FOOTER ─── */
footer {
  background: #080808; border-top: 2px solid var(--red);
  padding: 3.5rem 4rem; display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 3rem;
}
.foot-logo { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 2.5rem; color: var(--white); letter-spacing: 0.1em; line-height: 1; }
.foot-logo span { color: var(--red); }
.foot-tag { font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.25em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 0.25rem; margin-bottom: 1.25rem; }
.foot-desc { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.7; max-width: 240px; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
.foot-socials { display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; }
.social { width: 34px; height: 34px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--muted); text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.2s; font-weight: 600; }
.social:hover { border-color: var(--red); color: var(--red); }
.foot-col-h { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 1.25rem; }
.foot-links { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.65rem; }
.foot-links a { color: var(--muted); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.8rem; transition: color 0.2s; }
.foot-links a:hover { color: var(--yellow); }
.foot-contact { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.65rem; }
.foot-ci { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.5; }
.foot-bottom { background: #050505; padding: 1rem 4rem; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.7rem; color: rgba(154,143,133,0.4); border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.03); }

/* ─── ANIMATIONS ─── */
@keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
.hero-content > * { animation: fadeUp 0.7s ease both; }
.hero-content > *:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.15s; }
.hero-content > *:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">
    <div>
      <div>ULI<span>X</span></div>
      <div class="nav-tag">Gastro Bar · Est. 2016 · PG</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">O Nama</a></li>
    <li><a href="#menu">Meni</a></li>
    <li><a href="#vibe">Prostor</a></li>
    <li><a href="#visit">Posjeta</a></li>
  </ul>
  <button class="nav-cta" onclick="document.getElementById('visit').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">Rezervacija</button>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <img class="hero-bg" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="ULIX Interior">
  <div class="hero-overlay"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div>
      <div class="hero-eyebrow">
        <div class="hero-eyebrow-line"></div>
        <div class="hero-eyebrow-text">Podgorica · City Quart · Radoja Dakića</div>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-title">
        <div>REPUB</div>
        <div class="outline">LIKA</div>
        <div class="red">DOBROG</div>
        <div>UKUSA</div>
      </div>
      <p class="hero-desc">Gastrobar koji spaja međunarodne okuse sa toplinom lokalnih farmi. Od jutarnje kafe do večernjeg spektakla — ULIX je tu za vas.</p>
      <div class="hero-btns">
        <button class="btn-red" onclick="document.getElementById('menu').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">Pogledaj Meni</button>
        <button class="btn-ghost" onclick="document.getElementById('visit').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">Rezerviši Sto</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stats">
      <div><div class="stat-num">120</div><div class="stat-label">Mjesta</div></div>
      <div><div class="stat-num">8AM</div><div class="stat-label">Otvaramo</div></div>
      <div><div class="stat-num">2016</div><div class="stat-label">Osnovano</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TICKER -->
<div class="ticker">
  <div class="ticker-inner">
    <span>ULIX GASTRO BAR</span><span class="dot">●</span>
    <span>REPUBLIC OF GOOD FOOD</span><span class="dot">●</span>
    <span>PODGORICA</span><span class="dot">●</span>
    <span>EST. 2016</span><span class="dot">●</span>
    <span>LOCAL &amp; ECOLOGICAL</span><span class="dot">●</span>
    <span>DINE IN · DELIVERY · EVENTS</span><span class="dot">●</span>
    <span>ULIX GASTRO BAR</span><span class="dot">●</span>
    <span>REPUBLIC OF GOOD FOOD</span><span class="dot">●</span>
    <span>PODGORICA</span><span class="dot">●</span>
    <span>EST. 2016</span><span class="dot">●</span>
    <span>LOCAL &amp; ECOLOGICAL</span><span class="dot">●</span>
    <span>DINE IN · DELIVERY · EVENTS</span><span class="dot">●</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- GALLERY -->
<div class="gallery">
  <div class="gal-item">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Interior">
    <div class="gal-label">Main Hall</div>
  </div>
  <div class="gal-item">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Bar">
    <div class="gal-label">The Bar</div>
  </div>
  <div class="gal-item">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Dining">
    <div class="gal-label">Dining Area</div>
  </div>
  <div class="gal-item">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Exterior">
    <div class="gal-label">Terasa</div>
  </div>
  <div class="gal-item">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Detail">
    <div class="gal-label">Ambijent</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section class="about" id="about">
  <div>
    <div class="about-badge">
      <div class="about-badge-top">Gastro Bar</div>
      <div class="about-badge-main">ULIX</div>
      <div class="about-badge-sub">Est. 2016 · Podgorica</div>
    </div>
    <h2 class="about-h">VIŠE OD <em>RESTORANA</em> —<br>NAČIN ŽIVOTA</h2>
    <p class="about-p">ULIX je izgrađen na jednostavnoj ideji: odlična hrana dolazi iz odličnih izvora. Sarađujemo isključivo sa ekološki orijentisanim farmama iz crnogorskih dolina kako bismo vam donijeli sastojke na vrhuncu svježine.</p>
    <p class="about-p">Od domaće paste (nudelci) i svježe pečenog hljeba do kućnih deserta — svaki element na tanjiru sprema se od nule. Naša kuhinja ne prečiće.</p>
    <div class="about-tags">
      <span class="tag">🌿 Ekološki Uzgoj</span>
      <span class="tag">👨‍🍳 Domaće Pripremljeno</span>
      <span class="tag">🏔️ Lokalni Proizvođači</span>
      <span class="tag">🎉 Event Catering</span>
      <span class="tag">🚴 Glovo Dostava</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="about-img-grid">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Bar area">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Interior">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Exterior">
  </div>
</section>

<!-- MENU -->
<section class="menu-section" id="menu">
  <div class="section-header">
    <div>
      <div class="section-label">Top Sellers</div>
      <h2 class="section-h">NAJTRAŽENIJI<br><em>SPECIJALITETI</em></h2>
    </div>
    <p style="font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--muted);max-width:260px;line-height:1.7">Doručak se servira do 13h. Svaki dan svježe, od lokalnih domaćinstava.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="menu-grid">

    <div class="dish-card">
      <div class="dish-img-wrap">
        <img class="dish-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Cezar salata">
        <div class="dish-rank">1</div>
      </div>
      <div class="dish-body">
        <div class="dish-top">
          <div class="dish-name">Cezar Salata</div>
          <div class="dish-price">10,70€</div>
        </div>
        <div class="dish-weight">350gr</div>
        <div class="dish-desc">Pileći file, zelena salata, krutoni, cezar preliv, slanina, parmezan, jaja od prepelice</div>
        <div class="dish-bar"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="dish-card">
      <div class="dish-img-wrap">
        <img class="dish-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Hrskava piletina">
        <div class="dish-rank">2</div>
      </div>
      <div class="dish-body">
        <div class="dish-top">
          <div class="dish-name">Hrskava Piletina</div>
          <div class="dish-price">10,50€</div>
        </div>
        <div class="dish-weight">350gr</div>
        <div class="dish-desc">Hrskavo pohovani komadi piletine, zlatno pečeni i sočni iznutra</div>
        <div class="dish-bar"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="dish-card">
      <div class="dish-img-wrap">
        <img class="dish-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Sendvič sa biftekom">
        <div class="dish-rank">3</div>
      </div>
      <div class="dish-body">
        <div class="dish-top">
          <div class="dish-name">Sendvič sa Biftekom</div>
          <div class="dish-price">8,70€</div>
        </div>
        <div class="dish-weight">300gr</div>
        <div class="dish-desc">Biftek, dimljeni sir, pavlaka, paradajz, zelena salata, pomfrit</div>
        <div class="dish-bar"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="dish-card">
      <div class="dish-img-wrap">
        <img class="dish-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Pizza štapići">
        <div class="dish-rank">4</div>
      </div>
      <div class="dish-body">
        <div class="dish-top">
          <div class="dish-name">Pizza Štapići</div>
          <div class="dish-price">8,00€</div>
        </div>
        <div class="dish-weight">300gr</div>
        <div class="dish-desc">Njeguška pršuta, pelat, pavlaka, sir — ili kulen, šunka po izboru</div>
        <div class="dish-bar"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="dish-card">
      <div class="dish-img-wrap">
        <img class="dish-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Pizza Capricciosa">
        <div class="dish-rank">5</div>
      </div>
      <div class="dish-body">
        <div class="dish-top">
          <div class="dish-name">Pizza Capricciosa</div>
          <div class="dish-price">8,00€</div>
        </div>
        <div class="dish-weight">400gr</div>
        <div class="dish-desc">Šunka, sir, šampinjoni, pelat</div>
        <div class="dish-bar"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="dish-card">
      <div class="dish-img-wrap">
        <img class="dish-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Tortilja sa spanaćem">
        <div class="dish-rank">6</div>
      </div>
      <div class="dish-body">
        <div class="dish-top">
          <div class="dish-name">Tortilja sa Spanaćem</div>
          <div class="dish-price">8,00€</div>
        </div>
        <div class="dish-weight">350gr</div>
        <div class="dish-desc">Piletina, spanać, sezonsko povrće, Njeguška pršuta, neutralna pavlaka, pomfrit</div>
        <div class="dish-bar"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="dish-card">
      <div class="dish-img-wrap">
        <img class="dish-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Cheeseburger">
        <div class="dish-rank">7</div>
      </div>
      <div class="dish-body">
        <div class="dish-top">
          <div class="dish-name">Cheeseburger</div>
          <div class="dish-price">7,70€</div>
        </div>
        <div class="dish-weight">400gr</div>
        <div class="dish-desc">Juneće meso, burger sos, luk, zelena salata, cheddar sir, kiseli krastavac, paradajz, pomfrit</div>
        <div class="dish-bar"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="dish-card">
      <div class="dish-img-wrap">
        <img class="dish-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Ulix sendvič">
        <div class="dish-rank">8</div>
      </div>
      <div class="dish-body">
        <div class="dish-top">
          <div class="dish-name">Ulix Sendvič</div>
          <div class="dish-price">7,50€</div>
        </div>
        <div class="dish-weight">300gr</div>
        <div class="dish-desc">Dimljeni losos, krem sos, pesto, rukola, cherry paradajz, pomfrit</div>
        <div class="dish-bar"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="dish-card">
      <div class="dish-img-wrap">
        <img class="dish-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Tortilja sa piletinom">
        <div class="dish-rank">9</div>
      </div>
      <div class="dish-body">
        <div class="dish-top">
          <div class="dish-name">Tortilja sa Piletinom</div>
          <div class="dish-price">7,30€</div>
        </div>
        <div class="dish-weight">350gr</div>
        <div class="dish-desc">Piletina, sezonsko povrće, neutralna pavlaka, sir, pomfrit</div>
        <div class="dish-bar"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- FEATURES -->
<section class="features">
  <div class="feat"><div class="feat-icon">☀️</div><div class="feat-title">Cijeli Dan</div><p class="feat-desc">Otvoreni od 8 ujutro — kafa, brunch, ručak, večera i kokteli.</p></div>
  <div class="feat"><div class="feat-icon">📺</div><div class="feat-title">Sport Live</div><p class="feat-desc">Pratite utakmice uživo na velikim ekranima uz omiljeno piće.</p></div>
  <div class="feat"><div class="feat-icon">🚴</div><div class="feat-title">Glovo Dostava</div><p class="feat-desc">Naručite ULIX iskustvo direktno na vašu adresu u Podgorici.</p></div>
  <div class="feat"><div class="feat-icon">🎉</div><div class="feat-title">Event Catering</div><p class="feat-desc">Organizujemo proslavljanja i evente do 120 gostiju.</p></div>
</section>

<!-- VIBE -->
<section class="vibe" id="vibe">
  <div>
    <h2 class="vibe-h">
      <div>URBAN</div>
      <div class="stroke">ENERGY.</div>
      <div>LOCAL</div>
      <div class="stroke">SOUL.</div>
    </h2>
  </div>
  <div class="vibe-points">
    <div class="vibe-point"><div class="vibe-dot"></div><div class="vibe-text"><strong>Industrijski Dizajn</strong>Cigla, neon, vintage detalji — prostor koji pričiča priču o gradu i stilu.</div></div>
    <div class="vibe-point"><div class="vibe-dot"></div><div class="vibe-text"><strong>Šarene Stolice &amp; Zelene Sofe</strong>Eklektičan, topao interijer koji podstiče opuštanje i dobro raspoloženje.</div></div>
    <div class="vibe-point"><div class="vibe-dot"></div><div class="vibe-text"><strong>Terasa sa Pogledom</strong>Otvoreni prostor za uživanje u toplim Podgoričkim danima i večerima.</div></div>
    <div class="vibe-point"><div class="vibe-dot"></div><div class="vibe-text"><strong>Pristupačnost</strong>Prostor je potpuno prilagođen osobama u invalidskim kolicima.</div></div>
    <div class="vibe-point"><div class="vibe-dot"></div><div class="vibe-text"><strong>Ekološki Pristup</strong>Sarađujemo sa lokalnim farmama doline — svježe, odgovorno, ukusno.</div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- VISIT -->
<section class="visit" id="visit">
  <img class="visit-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="ULIX Exterior">
  <div>
    <h2 class="visit-h">POSJETITE<br>NAS U <em>PG</em></h2>
    <div class="info-grid">
      <div class="info-item">
        <div class="info-label">Adresa</div>
        <div class="info-val">Radoja Dakića<br>City Quart, Podgorica</div>
      </div>
      <div class="info-item">
        <div class="info-label">Radno Vrijeme</div>
        <div class="info-val">Svakog dana<br>od 8:00 do kasno</div>
      </div>
      <div class="info-item">
        <div class="info-label">Doručak</div>
        <div class="info-val">Do 13:00h<br>svaki dan</div>
      </div>
      <div class="info-item">
        <div class="info-label">Kapacitet</div>
        <div class="info-val">Do 120 gostiju<br>unutra + terasa</div>
      </div>
      <div class="info-item">
        <div class="info-label">Dostava</div>
        <div class="info-val">Putem Glovo<br>aplikacije</div>
      </div>
      <div class="info-item">
        <div class="info-label">Catering</div>
        <div class="info-val">Eventi &amp; proslave<br>po dogovoru</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="visit-btns">
      <button class="btn-red">📞 Pozovite Nas</button>
      <button class="btn-ghost">📍 Google Maps</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div>
    <div class="foot-logo">ULI<span>X</span></div>
    <div class="foot-tag">Gastro Bar · Est. 2016 · Podgorica</div>
    <p class="foot-desc">Republika dobrog ukusa. Moderni okusi ukorijenjeni u lokalnoj tradiciji, servirani sa toplinom u srcu Podgorice.</p>
    <div class="foot-socials">
      <a class="social" href="#">f</a>
      <a class="social" href="#">ig</a>
      <a class="social" href="#">g</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div>
    <div class="foot-col-h">Meni</div>
    <ul class="foot-links">
      <li><a href="#">Doručak</a></li>
      <li><a href="#">Salate</a></li>
      <li><a href="#">Sendviči</a></li>
      <li><a href="#">Pizza &amp; Pasta</a></li>
      <li><a href="#">Burgeri</a></li>
      <li><a href="#">Tortilije</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
  <div>
    <div class="foot-col-h">Usluge</div>
    <ul class="foot-links">
      <li><a href="#">Dine In</a></li>
      <li><a href="#">Dostava (Glovo)</a></li>
      <li><a href="#">Event Catering</a></li>
      <li><a href="#">Privatni Eventi</a></li>
      <li><a href="#">Rezervacije</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
  <div>
    <div class="foot-col-h">Pronađite Nas</div>
    <div class="foot-contact">
      <div class="foot-ci">📍 Radoja Dakića<br>City Quart, Podgorica</div>
      <div class="foot-ci">🕗 Svakog dana<br>od 08:00h</div>
      <div class="foot-ci">🚴 Dostava via Glovo</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</footer>
<div class="foot-bottom">
  <span>© 2025 ULIX Gastro Bar · Podgorica, Montenegro</span>
  <span>Republic of Good Food</span>
</div>

</body>
</html>
